docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALCANTARA, HEIDY AS TO DEFENDANT POCKETME INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HEIDY ALCANTARA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT COURT INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. DEFENDANT POCKETME INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DYLAN SALONER. DEFENDANT POCKETME INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALLISON SALONER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT POCKETME INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-30-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT SHALL DELIVER A 3 DIMENSION DIGITAL IMAGE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTHER TO 87 BRUSSELS STREET, SF CA 94134 BY MAY-23-2019. IF 3D IMAGE IS NOT DELIVERED DEFENDANT SHALL PAY JUDGMENT OF $441.82. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT MAY-30-2019 HEARING IF NO DELIVERY IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALCANTARA, HEIDY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALCANTARA, HEIDY AS TO DEFENDANT POCKETME INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT POCKETME INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
